rationale: In the citing paper, Lewis (2004) appears only in the literature review as part of a grouped citation supporting a general claim that reward/loyalty incentives can encourage ongoing behavior over time. The paper does not single out Lewis (2004) for specific findings, mechanisms, model components, or empirical benchmarks that are then used in its own design or interpretation. There is no clear reuse or direct extension of that study beyond broad background positioning of monetary incentives.
